description: Capability for the stopwatch window. No core API access beyond core:event:allow-listen, which is granted so it can listen for the locale-reload broadcast (src/locale-reload.ts). The stopwatch is entirely frontend (no backend run-state); it only invokes cmd_window_ready (generic) plus cmd_close_stopwatch and cmd_stopwatch_beep, the latter two restricted to this window by the require_stopwatch() caller-check in src/commands.rs.
